assertions.expectation: Starts with pre-flight checks: current versions, cluster health, node status
assertions.reason: Response includes comprehensive pre-flight checks: checking current versions with gcloud describe, node status with kubectl get nodes, and cluster health verification

assertions.expectation: Includes the gcloud command to check available versions in the release channel
assertions.reason: Response includes 'gcloud container get-server-config --zone us-west1-b --format="yaml(channels.REGULAR.validVersions)"' to check available versions in the Regular channel

assertions.expectation: Includes the API deprecation check command before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response includes 'kubectl get --raw /metrics | grep apiserver_request_total | grep deprecated' command to check for deprecated API usage

assertions.expectation: Provides the exact gcloud command for control plane upgrade (--master flag or --cluster-version)
assertions.reason: Response provides 'gcloud container clusters upgrade CLUSTER_NAME --zone us-west1-b --master --cluster-version 1.33' with the --master flag

assertions.expectation: Includes a verification step after control plane upgrade with expected output
assertions.reason: Response includes verification command 'gcloud container clusters describe' with expected output of '1.33.x' for the master version

assertions.expectation: Provides gcloud commands for node pool upgrades — may use skip-level (N+2) for node pools to reduce steps
assertions.reason: Response provides specific gcloud commands for upgrading each node pool: 'gcloud container node-pools upgrade default-pool' and 'gcloud container node-pools upgrade workload-pool' directly to 1.33

assertions.expectation: Includes monitoring commands to watch node pool upgrade progress
assertions.reason: Response includes 'watch' commands to monitor node pool upgrade progress, showing node status and scheduling state changes

assertions.expectation: Provides sequential control plane upgrades (1.32→1.33) with option for skip-level node pool upgrades
assertions.reason: Response shows direct upgrade from 1.32 to 1.33 for control plane, and node pools are upgraded directly to 1.33 (skip-level approach)

assertions.expectation: Includes post-upgrade validation: node versions, pod health, kube-system pods
assertions.reason: Response includes comprehensive post-upgrade validation: checking all versions, node status, deployment health, pod status, and includes kube-system pod checks

assertions.expectation: Provides a rollback section explaining what to do if something goes wrong
assertions.reason: While the response includes troubleshooting steps and mentions that cancellation doesn't exist, it lacks a proper rollback section explaining recovery procedures or how to handle failed upgrades
